message:
🐛 fix: Login wizard — Copilot review + hex ratchet (#8546, #8547) (#8558)

Address 4 Copilot review comments on Login.tsx from PR #8545:

1. handleCopyStep now checks copyToClipboard() return value before
   showing success feedback — previously showed checkmark even on failure
2. OAuth probe uses checkOAuthConfiguredWithRetry() instead of
   checkOAuthConfigured() so it retries/polls when the backend is slow
   to start
3. Setup button uses data-testid="github-setup-button" instead of
   reusing "github-login-button" — distinct testids for distinct buttons
4. Added test coverage for the OAuth setup wizard path
   (backendUp && !oauthConfigured) with 3 new test cases

Replace raw hex colors with semantic Tailwind classes:
- bg-[#0a0a0a] → bg-background (2 occurrences)
- from-[#0a0f1c] → from-background
- Fix multi-line JSX comment continuation lines that tripped false-positive
  hex detection (use * prefix per CLAUDE.md conventions)
- Lower ratchet baselines: raw-hex 270→269, arbitrary-tw-color 22→19

Fixes #8546, Fixes #8547

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
